description: Baseline S0-hi. vis_loss=31.28. Vis correct, task time near Pi, but high input-token overhead: vis_input_tokens=18440 vs pi_input_tokens=6.

asi.hypothesis: Baseline run of S0-hi smoke task before optimization.
asi.primary_bottleneck: Vis sends about 18k input tokens for a trivial prompt while Pi sends 6 input tokens.
investigation_targets: default tools registered for trivial turns
asi.next_action_hint: Run VTUI start gate next, then audit Vis trivial-prompt input-token source.

description: Start gate VTUI-open-missing-conversation passed. vis_loss=6.27, correctness 100, expected exit 2 observed. Startup dominated by extension discovery/manifest require around 1.1s each.

asi.hypothesis: Confirm CLI/TUI runner emits METRIC lines before optimization; use phase timings to identify startup bottleneck.
asi.metric_mapping_note: CLI startup tasks have no Pi/model token metrics; absent agent-comparison metrics logged as zero to satisfy session metric schema.
asi.observed_bottleneck: Extension discovery and manifest requires each consume about 1.1s of the 6.27s startup path.
asi.next_action_hint: Inspect CLI/TUI startup path and extension discovery code; target VCLI/VTUI speed without hiding proof/audit semantics.
